cases.description: Work completion claim triggers systematic verification
cases.prompt: I've finished implementing the feature. can we verify everything is working?
expectations: Runs the test suite to verify all tests pass
Checks that all acceptance criteria are met
Produces a pass/fail report before marking work complete

cases.prompt: are we done? can I close this task?
expectations: Does NOT just say 'yes' without verifying
Checks the original task requirements against current state
Confirms no TODOs or incomplete steps remain

cases.prompt: verify everything is good before I create the pull request
expectations: Checks that the implementation matches the requirements
Verifies no debug code or temporary files are present
Produces a clear YES/NO verdict with evidence
Runs available checks (tests, lint, type checks)

cases.description: Running tests without a completion claim should trigger test-suite, not verification
cases.prompt: run the test suite and show me the results
expectations: Does NOT invoke the verification skill
Simply runs the tests and reports results

cases.description: Adding new functionality should NOT trigger verification
cases.prompt: add input validation to the login form
expectations: Does NOT invoke the verification skill
Does NOT run a completion verification workflow
